prompt: Detailed scientific botanical illustration of AI-hallucinated deep sea mushroom species discovered at 3000m depth. Specimens arranged on dark navy paper. Features: a mushroom with a cap made of overlapping iridescent scales like a pangolin, a tall thin mushroom with a helix-twisted stem and umbrella cap dripping with bioluminescent mucus, a cluster growing from a fossilized ammonite shell with caps shaped like radio dishes receiving signals from space, and a massive mushroom whose cross-section reveals concentric rings of different impossible colors like an agate stone. Rendered in precise copperplate engraving style with hand-tinted color, measurement annotations, depth pressure markers, and collection date stamps
